items.title: Pump.fun unlocks $18M in tokens: Can bulls absorb PUMP’s supply?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The release of $18 million in PUMP tokens could impact market dynamics, testing the ability of bulls to absorb increased supply without significant price pressure.

items.title: Alameda moves $16 million in Solana's SOL token for possible creditor distribution
items.whyYouShouldCare: Alameda's transfer of $16 million in SOL tokens suggests potential liquidity shifts, which may influence market sentiment and creditor relations within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Weekly recap of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP ETF performance
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tracking ETF performance for major cryptocurrencies, including Solana, offers insights into institutional interest and market trends that could affect SOL's positioning.
